ksas.statement: Knowledge of SQL for data querying, including joins, aggregations, window functions, subqueries, and query optimization fundamentals.
Skill in writing production-quality data transformation code in SQL and at least one general-purpose programming language (Python or Scala), including unit testing and documentation.
Skill in writing well-structured, tested, and documented SQL transformations that produce reliable, reusable datasets for analytics consumers.
Skill in translating business metric definitions from domain stakeholders into precise, unambiguous SQL logic with documented assumptions and edge case handling.
Package and deploy ML models to production serving infrastructure, including containerization, API wrapping, load testing, and rollback procedures.
Govern the enterprise reference data library, including controlled vocabulary management, change request processing, and version control.
Implement automated data testing on all transformation outputs, including uniqueness, not-null, referential integrity, and custom business rule tests.
